DEFENDANT JASON ADAMS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF-OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ADAMS, JASON $2,589.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,704.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
